Scoreboard NetGraph:
//Netgraph on tab
alias +scoregraph "+showscores; net_graph 4"
alias -scoregraph "-showscores; net_graph 0"

bind TAB +scoregraph
Flashlight Spam:
//Flashlight spam script
alias "+21" "alias 23 +22; +22"
alias "+22" "impulse 100; wait; -22"
alias "-22" "impulse 100; wait; 23"
alias "23" "+22"

alias "-21" "alias 23 impulse 100;"

alias "+31" "impulse 100; -21"
alias "-31" "32"

alias "32" "alias -31 +21; wait 20; alias -31 32"

bind MWHEELUP +31
Jump Haymaker:
// JUMP HAYMAKER
alias +crouchjump "+jump; +duck; wait 10; -duck;"
alias -crouchjump "-jump; wait 1; -duck;"
alias +doubleattack "+attack2; wait 1; +attack;"
alias -doubleattack "-attack2; wait 1; -attack;"
alias +jumphaymaker "+doubleattack; wait 3; +crouchjump;"
alias -jumphaymaker "-doubleattack; wait 1; -crouchjump;"

bind "w" "+jumphaymaker"
Fast Melee:
// FAST MELEE
alias MeleeSwap "+attack;wait 5;invnext;wait 5;slot2;-attack"
alias +MFire "alias MRepeat_function +MRepeat; +MRepeat"
alias -MFire "alias MRepeat_function stopRepeating"
alias MRepeat_function "+MRepeat"
alias +MRepeat "+attack;wait 10;invnext;wait 10;slot2;-attack;-MRepeat"
alias -MRepeat "wait 46; MRepeat_function"
alias stopRepeating ""
alias "MToggle" "MToggleOn"
alias "MToggleOn" "+MFire; alias MToggle MToggleOff; play buttons/button14"
alias "MToggleOff" "-MFire; alias MToggle MToggleOn; play ui/beep_error01"

bind "x" "MToggle"
